# Support

Need help? Check these first:

- **Website**: [pxmon.com](https://pxmon.com)
- **Documentation**: [pxmon.com/docs](https://pxmon.com)
- **Bug reports**: [open an issue](https://github.com/pxmoncom/pxmon/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
- **Feature requests**: [open a request](https://github.com/pxmoncom/pxmon/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
- **Discussion**: [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/pxmoncom/pxmon/discussions)

For security issues, please do **not** open a public issue. See [`SECURITY.md`](SECURITY.md).
